title: MailerLite vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: MailerLite vs Constant Contact: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
h1: MailerLite vs Constant Contact: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between MailerLite and Constant Contact comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. MailerLite is built for small businesses and freelancers on a budget, while Constant Contact targets nonprofits and local businesses. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small Businesses And Freelancers On A Budget

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses and freelancers on a budget
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on nonprofits and local businesses

faq.q: Is MailerLite better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. MailerLite wins for small businesses and freelancers on a budget, while Constant Contact is stronger for nonprofits and local businesses. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Constant Contact?
faq.a: MailerLite starts at a lower price point ($9/mo vs $12/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Constant Contact to MailerLite is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
